race.description: Prydes Easifeed Queen Elizabeth Ii Mile (G1)
race.comment: Hard to go past star mare CAPTAINS MISTRESS NZ (2) from an ideal draw. She was a horror story when held up in the Miracle Mile when last seen in March and was flying with a string of wins prior including the Chariots of Fire at this circuit and distance. Hasn't raced for seven weeks but was readied with a trial win. Has the speed to take full advantage of this barrier and is beautifully placed against the mares. Last year's winner EYE KEEP SMILING (4) is back in form at the right time, coming from wider to win last week's Robin Dundee. Has been no match for Captains Mistress when they've met this year but she has been a topline mare for a few seasons now and has a great record at the Menangle mile. TOKYO ROSE NZ (10) was just edged out by EYE KEEP SMILING last week, her first defeat in five tries at this circuit and distance. Draws wide but can be involved from out there. Last year's luckless runner-up STENO (7) can feature again having come from wider to win the Sibelia here last start.
